subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from Us unto him who attained to the Dawning-place of revelation and the Dayspring of lights
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی من فاز بمشرق الوحی و مطلع الانوار لیفرح بذکر الله علی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation
